title: Uruguayan Fish Cakes
description: A flavorful and crispy fish cake dish inspired by the Uruguayan cuisine, made with fresh fish, flaky white fish, and spices.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the fresh fish, flaky white fish, onion, bell pepper, and garlic. Mix well.
2. Add the beaten egg to the bowl and mix until just combined.
3. Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions and shape each portion into a patty.
4. Coat each patty with flour, shaking off excess.
5. Heat the skillet oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add 4 patties to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Serve the fish cakes hot with your favorite sides, such as a salad or fries.
